title: Solo Leveling -ReAwakening-
originalTitle: 俺だけレベルアップな件 -ReAwakening-
tmdbOverview: Over a decade after 'gates' connecting worlds appeared, awakening 'hunters' with superpowers, weakest hunter Sung Jinwoo encounters a double dungeon and accepts a mysterious quest, becoming the only one able to level up, changing his fate. A catch-up recap of the first season coupled with an exclusive sneak peek of the first two episodes of the highly anticipated second season in one momentous theatrical fan experience.
synopsis: Released in 2024, Solo Leveling -ReAwakening- is a action, adventure and fantasy film from Japan. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.7 on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
